notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno steals (2) 2nd base. Gabriel Moreno to 3rd. Gabriel Moreno advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Brett Sullivan.

notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo reaches on a throwing error by shortstop Willi Castro.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt. Hunter Goodman to 2nd. Hunter Goodman advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by center fielder Ryan Waldschmidt.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Nolan Arenado. Troy Johnston scores. Jake McCarthy to 3rd. Fielding error by third baseman Nolan Arenado.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Nolan Arenado. Troy Johnston scores. Jake McCarthy to 3rd. Fielding error by third baseman Nolan Arenado.
